findings.notes: CONFIRMED: Transaction-wrapped (db.transaction line 370) delete+insert per row into vec_memories (lines 371-377). vec0 virtual table writes block Turso migration.
CONFIRMED: Probes sqlite_master for memory_fts table existence (line 478-480). Gates FTS5 vs in-memory BM25 engine selection.
CONFIRMED: ATTACH/DETACH used at lines 243-244 (legacy+shard) and 272-273 (DETACH). Turso has no ATTACH — requires architectural redesign.
CONFIRMED: Creates vec0 virtual table in attached shard (line 72: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE shard.vec_memories USING vec0) and copies rows. Turso has no vec0, no ATTACH, no loadExtension.
CONFIRMED: FTS5 'delete-all' command at line 1606 in clearTable(). Turso/libSQL lacks FTS5.
CONFIRMED: FTS5 'rebuild' in runDerivedArtifactRebuilds fts-rebuild step (line 1930). Also used in schema-downgrade.ts:234.

findings.signature: function restoreCheckpointV2(database, checkpoint, scope, opts): RestoreResult
findings.notes: CONFIRMED: Entirely file-copy based — fs.renameSync (line 2689), fs.copyFileSync (lines 2692, 2704). Turso remote DB cannot fs.copyFileSync.
CONFIRMED: VACUUM active_vec INTO at line 2284 in createCheckpointV2. Turso lacks ATTACH and VACUUM INTO.
CONFIRMED: VACUUM main INTO at line 2281 in createCheckpointV2. Turso/libSQL does not support VACUUM INTO.

findings.signature: SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name='memory_fts'
findings.notes: CONFIRMED: FTS5 virtual table existence probe in verifyFts5Isolation (line 111-113). Turso lacks FTS5.
CONFIRMED: Direct better-sqlite3 driver import. Every call site couples to synchronous better-sqlite3 API. Turso uses @libsql/client.
CONFIRMED: Three .pragma() calls at lines 299-301. libSQL lacks .pragma() method.
CONFIRMED: loadExtension at line 430 in writeVectorsToShard. Turso blocks extension loading.
CONFIRMED: Three .pragma() calls at lines 147-149. libSQL has no .pragma() API.
CONFIRMED: FTS5 optimize command at line 343 in runPostDeleteMaintenance. Turso has no FTS5.
CONFIRMED: loadExtension at line 242 during shard migration. Turso blocks extension loading.
CONFIRMED: sqlite-vec scalar function at line 314 (vector_search), lines 403+407 (multi_concept_search). Turso has no vec_distance_cosine.

findings.signature: FTS5 bm25() ranking function with per-column weights
findings.notes: REFUTED: No bm25() function call with per-column weights exists in this file. FTS5 virtual table is created at line 1256 but bm25() ranking is not called here. BM25 weights are in bm25-index.ts for the in-memory engine, not FTS5 bm25().

findings.symbol: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE memory_fts USING fts5
findings.signature: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE memory_fts USING fts5(title, trigger_phrases, file_path, content_text, content='memory_index', content_rowid='id')
findings.notes: CONFIRMED: FTS5 virtual table + 3 sync triggers (lines 1256-1281 in migration v14). Turso lacks FTS5.

findings.signature: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE memory_fts USING fts5(...)
findings.notes: CONFIRMED: FTS5 virtual table for BM25 full-text search. Turso lacks FTS5 — must use external engine.
CONFIRMED: vec0 virtual table created at line 518 (CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE ... USING vec0). vec_distance_cosine used via queries module. Must be reimplemented for Turso.
CONFIRMED: FTS5 delete-all at line 1606, rebuild at line 1930. Turso/libSQL has no FTS5.
CONFIRMED: VACUUM active_vec INTO at line 2284. Turso cannot attach databases or VACUUM INTO.
CONFIRMED: VACUUM main INTO at line 2281. SQLite-specific snapshot mechanism; Turso/libSQL lacks this.
CONFIRMED: Full FTS5 virtual table creation with content-sync triggers and rebuild (lines 204-234). Turso has no FTS5 or loadExtension.
CONFIRMED: Three .pragma() calls at lines 270-272. Turso/libSQL has no .pragma() method.
CONFIRMED: WAL triplet file model at lines 41-45. All copy/move/restore logic (copyTriplet, moveTriplet, restoreTriplet) becomes obsolete with Turso remote replicas.
CONFIRMED: integrity_check pragma at line 128 in runIntegrityCheck. Local SQLite; Turso has no embedded integrity check.

findings.signature: async function retryEmbedding(id, content, claimedPreviousStatus): Promise<RetryResult>
findings.notes: CONFIRMED: vec_memories is a vec0 virtual table — DELETE+INSERT at lines 756-762. Turso/libSQL has NO vector index support; migration blocker.

findings.signature: WITH RECURSIVE causal_walk(origin_id, node_id, hop_distance, walk_score) AS (...)
findings.notes: CONFIRMED: Recursive CTE with bidirectional UNION seed (lines 431-447) + UNION ALL recursive step (lines 449-463). Turso lacks WITH RECURSIVE.
CONFIRMED: Core recursive CTE for graph traversal with bidirectional edges and relation-weighted scoring (lines 431-468). Turso lacks WITH RECURSIVE.

findings.signature: WITH RECURSIVE causal_walk(...) AS (SELECT ... UNION SELECT ... UNION ALL SELECT ...)
findings.notes: CONFIRMED: Recursive CTE for 2-hop graph traversal. Turso lacks WITH RECURSIVE — must be replaced with iterative application-side traversal.

findings.signature: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE memory_fts USING fts5(...)
findings.notes: CONFIRMED: FTS5 virtual table for BM25 full-text search. Turso/libSQL lacks FTS5; entire FTS search path blocks migration.
CONFIRMED: VACUUM main INTO is the core v2 checkpoint snapshot mechanism at line 2281. Turso/libSQL lacks this — blocks checkpoint creation.

findings.signature: WITH RECURSIVE dependents(child_path) AS (SELECT ... UNION SELECT ...)
findings.notes: CONFIRMED: Recursive CTE for transitive dependency closure at lines 192-206. collectDependents() and wouldCreateCycle() both depend on this. Turso lacks WITH RECURSIVE.

findings.signature: WITH RECURSIVE dependents(child_path) AS (SELECT child_path FROM dependency_edges WHERE ... UNION SELECT edge.child_path FROM dependency_edges edge JOIN dependents dep ON ...)
findings.notes: CONFIRMED: Recursive CTE for transitive dependency closure with cycle detection. Turso lacks WITH RECURSIVE — must rewrite as iterative BFS.
